message:
refactor: wrap sidebar mobile functions in useCallback (#5638)

Address Copilot review feedback from #5629 — make closeMobileSidebar,
openMobileSidebar, and toggleMobileSidebar stable references via
useCallback so Sidebar.tsx can include them in useEffect deps without
the eslint-disable-line suppress.

This is the proper fix for the render loop: stable function refs mean
the effect only fires when location.pathname or isMobile changes, not
on every render.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
